payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its authoritative-state refusal","added the Phase 5 public trust registry as a required repository-variable input to the Linux premerge validation job","provisioned trust before checkout by decoding only into runner.temp","verified the exact owner-supplied SHA-256 before candidate checkout or premerge execution","forwarded the verified temporary path and exact digest through the existing paired Phase 5 environment contract","changed external trusted-owner loading to one no-follow regular-file descriptor one bounded byte buffer and digest plus strict duplicate-key parsing of those identical bytes","seeded deterministic duplicate-key and post-hash atomic-pathname-substitution adversaries and proved parsing remains bound to the original opened bytes","expanded the whole-workflow verifier to mask quoted GitHub expression strings and reject every remaining vars secrets or steps context identifier after removing only the two exact approved blocks","seeded workflow-global job-global Windows leak Phase 5 secret post-checkout candidate-overwrite computed split-key bracket format and whitespace adversaries for nineteen workflow cases","ran the six-group live verifier against the owner-supplied external registry at exact f55a117eb20df727ee21cb922345d62bce3f3afc4458ba5a8b057dc430c9bb6d and rejected 48 of 48 adversaries","documented this as CI trust configuration without production or release authority"]
payload.decisions_made: ["treat PHASE5_TRUSTED_OWNER_REGISTRY_BASE64 as public external trust material in a repository variable rather than a secret","pin the verified external registry digest f55a117eb20df727ee21cb922345d62bce3f3afc4458ba5a8b057dc430c9bb6d in workflow and verifier contracts","decode before checkout only under runner.temp and reject checkout paths so candidate files cannot authenticate themselves","scope the paired registry path and digest only to scripts/validate-premerge.sh","hash and parse one already-opened bounded buffer so pathname substitution cannot change authenticated trust bytes","after removing the two exact approved blocks reject every GitHub expression access to vars secrets or steps contexts rather than attempting to recognize only the Phase 5 key spelling","leave harness-cli-release.yml unchanged because the requested trust provisioning is a premerge validation input and release authority remains unchanged"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused because the pre-existing authoritative core state is unavailable and no database was initialized","premerge previously invoked the strict Phase 5 verifier without provisioning the externally authorized public registry","review found load_external_trusted_owners hashed one pathname read and parse_trusted_owners reopened the pathname allowing atomic substitution","review found the workflow verifier ignored Phase 5 trust exposure outside the validate job exact snippets","final review found computed GitHub vars secrets and steps expressions could reconstruct sensitive keys or outputs without retaining literal Phase 5 markers"]
payload.harness_friction: The required bootstrap cannot restore the verified core epoch because the pre-existing authoritative state is unavailable. Matrix queries and CLI-authored records remain unavailable, so this amended child commit preserves that state and supplies an additive replayable trace.
payload.notes: This trace records CI configuration for the already authorized original external public registry. Live verification passed six executable proof groups with the exact owner-supplied external registry digest and 48 of 48 Phase 5 adversaries rejected; the workflow forwarding contract rejected nineteen static trust-exposure adversaries. It creates no trust from candidate files and grants no production, signing, promotion, Phase 7, or release authority. No push, dispatch, main mutation, secret, private key, tag, release, package, or publish action occurred. Duration and token estimates are unavailable.
payload.task_summary: Provisioned pinned external Phase 5 public trust for premerge CI
